specs.key_requirements: Phase 1 implementation that Phase 2 directly extends — defines spec_alignment module structure, violation model, CheckResult, CLI pattern. Data models SpecDocument, SpecSection, CodeBlock, Violation, ViolationKind, FileResult, CheckResult are the base types Phase 2 extends. Architecture: single spec_alignment::check() entry point, files under crates/cclab-sdd/src/spec_alignment/. CLI: cclab sdd check-alignment [path] --json, exit 0/1.

CLI command tree — Phase 2 extends check-alignment with --coverage flag. CLI handler pattern: cclab-sdd-cli/src/check_alignment.rs delegates to spec_alignment::check(). CLI → logic mapping table needs new row for coverage sub-mode.

Defines symbol kinds (fn_item, struct_item, trait_item, impl_item) extracted by daemon's symbol index. Phase 2 queries the daemon's pre-built symbol index for these symbol types to perform coverage mapping.

Defines DaemonClient::for_workspace(root), client.symbols(file), client.index_status() with is_ready flag. R1: ensure_daemon_ready pattern (DaemonClient::for_workspace(), index_status().is_ready, 30s timeout). Phase 2's daemon interaction requires querying DaemonClient::symbols(file).

Storage path resolution: R1 ({project_root}/cclab/.index/ storage root), R2 (path canonicalization), R3 (SHA256 hashing), R4 (module index separation). Background context for where daemon stores its index.
Multi-language tree-sitter support (R1) — background context that language parsers exist. Fast-path AST-only (R6) — pattern reference only.
Workflow context: Phase 2 is a standalone library/CLI feature — workflow integration is Phase 3 (#1142).
resolve_spec_dir() used to canonicalize spec paths from @spec annotations against cclab/specs/ root.
